calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration, Calendar Motion: Arbitration Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-24-2001 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Geraldine Armendariz, Esq. 986-0873 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order signed in open court. Court reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193.
